allow: PowerShell(Write-Host "ANDROID_HOME: $env:ANDROID_HOME"; Write-Host "ANDROID_SDK_ROOT: $env:ANDROID_SDK_ROOT"; if \(Test-Path "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Android\\Sdk"\) { Write-Host "SDK found at: $env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Android\\Sdk"; Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Android\\Sdk" } elseif \(Test-Path "C:\\Android\\Sdk"\) { Write-Host "SDK found at: C:\\Android\\Sdk" } else { Write-Host "No SDK found at standard locations" })

PowerShell(Write-Host "ANDROID_HOME: $env:ANDROID_HOME"; Write-Host "JAVA_HOME: $env:JAVA_HOME"; Write-Host "---"; if \(Test-Path "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Android\\Sdk\\platform-tools\\adb.exe"\) { Write-Host "Found at LOCALAPPDATA"; & "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Android\\Sdk\\platform-tools\\adb.exe" devices -l 2>&1 } elseif \(Test-Path "C:\\Android\\Sdk\\platform-tools\\adb.exe"\) { Write-Host "Found at C:\\Android"; & "C:\\Android\\Sdk\\platform-tools\\adb.exe" devices -l 2>&1 } elseif \($env:ANDROID_HOME\) { $adbPath = Join-Path $env:ANDROID_HOME "platform-tools\\adb.exe"; if \(Test-Path $adbPath\) { Write-Host "Found at ANDROID_HOME"; & $adbPath devices -l 2>&1 } else { Write-Host "ANDROID_HOME set but adb not found at $adbPath" } } else { Write-Host "Checking common paths..."; Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Android" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Android" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue })

PowerShell($adb = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Android\\Sdk\\platform-tools\\adb.exe"; Write-Host "ADB path: $adb"; Write-Host "---"; & $adb devices 2>&1; Write-Host "---"; & $adb kill-server 2>&1; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; & $adb start-server 2>&1; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; & $adb devices 2>&1)

PowerShell($env:ANDROID_HOME = "C:\\Users\\PC\\AppData\\Local\\Android\\Sdk"; $env:JAVA_HOME = "C:\\Program Files\\Eclipse Adoptium\\jdk-17.0.19.10-hotspot"; $env:Path = "$env:ANDROID_HOME\\platform-tools;$env:JAVA_HOME\\bin;$env:Path"; cd "H:\\awedan-sahayak\\awedan-sahayak\\app\\AwedanSahayak"; npx expo start --dev-client 2>&1)

PowerShell($env:ANDROID_HOME = "C:\\Users\\PC\\AppData\\Local\\Android\\Sdk"; $env:JAVA_HOME = "C:\\Program Files\\Eclipse Adoptium\\jdk-17.0.19.10-hotspot"; $env:Path = "$env:ANDROID_HOME\\platform-tools;$env:JAVA_HOME\\bin;$env:Path"; cd "H:\\awedan-sahayak\\awedan-sahayak\\app\\AwedanSahayak"; npx expo run:android 2>&1)

PowerShell(Write-Host "=== Server aiService.ts ==="; npx tsc --noEmit --strict --moduleResolution node --target ES2020 --module ES2020 --esModuleInterop "H:/awedan-sahayak/awedan-sahayak/server/src/services/aiService.ts" 2>&1; Write-Host "`n=== Server claudeService.ts ==="; npx tsc --noEmit --strict --moduleResolution node --target ES2020 --module ES2020 --esModuleInterop "H:/awedan-sahayak/awedan-sahayak/server/src/services/claudeService.ts" 2>&1)
